expectations.text: Agent uses parse_tracker.py to show project status summary
expectations.evidence: Showed full progress table: 37/77 (48%) overall, with per-phase breakdown matching parse_tracker.py output.

expectations.text: Agent makes a strategic decision about which phase to prioritize
expectations.evidence: Chose Couple Features over Testing (0%) and UX Polish (23%), explaining it's the core MVP differentiator.

expectations.text: Agent explains reasoning for phase choice (not just picking lowest %)
expectations.evidence: Gave 3 reasons: product value, feature gaps at 50%, and that testing requires stable features first. Smart reasoning.

expectations.text: Agent completes at least one full task cycle with verification
expectations.evidence: Completed task #46 (backend) and #42 (frontend) with code review, TypeScript pass, and tracker update.
